XIT Source
An open-source data transformation engine and code generation framework.

Core Resources
/docs/engine: Data pipeline and adapter logic.
/modules/xml2bean: XML to Java Bean generation.
/adapters/velocity: Template merging for text output.

Project Meta
License: MIT (Permissive Open Source)
Repository: https://github.com/growthtoolbox/xitsource-prod
Tech Stack: Java, XML, Velocity, Next.js
